source_layer: Core computed arrangement over parsed case/vendor/reviewer tables
source_tables: G40G awarded vendor reviewer clique support
public_copy_note: Aggregate counts and context labels only. Source-level observations remain in Core.
target_suppliers_included: 栯辰工程顧問有限公司
協昌工程顧問有限公司
三恆一樹行銷有限公司
程龍營造工程有限公司

苙宏工程技術顧問有限公司
supplier_alias_notes: Exact supplier label 楠辰 was not observed in selected Core supplier records; surfaced high-frequency supplier 栯辰工程顧問有限公司 is included.

denominator_documentation.presence_denominator: For each supplier and reviewer condition, present_count plus absent_count equals supplier cases with reviewer observations.
denominator_documentation.absence_denominator: Absence uses the same supplier-specific universe and excludes cases where attended reviewer is in the selected group.
